calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Labor Code Sections 98.2 & 1194
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION INC' Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney's Fees Pursuant To Labor Code Sections 98.2 and 1194 is granted in the amount of $2,280. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditor's Trade Asociation, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
